targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(toDateTime(timestamp / 1000)) AS minute, COUNT(*) AS events FROM telemetry_events WHERE $__timeFilter(toDateTime(timestamp / 1000)) GROUP BY minute ORDER BY minute

SELECT toStartOfMinute(toDateTime(timestamp / 1000)) AS minute, AVG(bitrate) AS avg_bitrate_kbps FROM telemetry_events WHERE $__timeFilter(toDateTime(timestamp / 1000)) AND bitrate > 0 GROUP BY minute ORDER BY minute
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM telemetry_events WHERE $__timeFilter(toDateTime(timestamp / 1000))

panels.title: Active Users
panels.description: Unique viewers with a HEARTBEAT event in the selected time range

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT viewer_id) AS active_users FROM telemetry_events WHERE event_type = 'HEARTBEAT' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(timestamp / 1000))

panels.title: Average Buffer Duration (ms)
panels.description: Mean buffer stall duration from buffer_durations table

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(duration_ms) AS avg_buffer_ms FROM buffer_durations WHERE $__timeFilter(calculated_at)

panels.title: Buffer Stall Count
panels.description: Number of buffer stall events in selected time range

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS buffer_stalls FROM buffer_durations WHERE $__timeFilter(calculated_at)

panels.title: Buffer Duration over time (ms)
panels.description: Average buffer stall duration per minute

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(calculated_at) AS minute, AVG(duration_ms) AS avg_buffer_ms FROM buffer_durations WHERE $__timeFilter(calculated_at) GROUP BY minute ORDER BY minute

panels.title: Avg Buffer Timeout Elapsed (ms) over time
panels.description: How long sessions were stuck before timing out

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(recorded_at) AS minute, AVG(elapsed_ms) AS avg_elapsed_ms FROM buffer_timeouts WHERE $__timeFilter(recorded_at) GROUP BY minute ORDER BY minute

panels.title: Avg Bitrate per User (kbps)
panels.description: Average bitrate consumed per viewer in the selected time range

targets.rawSql: SELECT viewer_id, ROUND(AVG(bitrate), 2) AS avg_bitrate_kbps FROM telemetry_events WHERE $__timeFilter(toDateTime(timestamp / 1000)) AND bitrate > 0 GROUP BY viewer_id ORDER BY avg_bitrate_kbps DESC

panels.title: Avg Bitrate per User over time (kbps)

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(toDateTime(timestamp / 1000)) AS minute, viewer_id, AVG(bitrate) AS avg_bitrate_kbps FROM telemetry_events WHERE $__timeFilter(toDateTime(timestamp / 1000)) AND bitrate > 0 GROUP BY minute, viewer_id ORDER BY minute
